Appearances:

Defendant, Terence Moser, is present.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case did not settle, the trial date remains set. (Above-noted counsel did not check in with the clerk to notify the Court if the Case settled or not.)
